name: Bug Report
about: Report a build failure or kernel flash issue

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Trigger the workflow with these inputs: ...
2. Observe failure at step: ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Build Details
- Kernel source URL:
- Kernel branch:
- KernelSU tag:
- Actions run URL:

## Compile Log
Attach the `compile-log-*` artifact from the failed run if available.

## Device
- Model: (e.g. SM-A047F)
- Android version:
- Recovery used: (TWRP / OrangeFox)

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
